compiled_state.title: Implement PostToolUse hook to extract SUGGESTION: sentinel from sub-agent returns
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Implement story 95f8-7ec4: PostToolUse hook on Agent tool returns that extracts SUGGESTION: sentinels.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 95f8-7ec4

## Summary
Add a PostToolUse hook to plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-bash.sh (or post-all.sh) that intercepts Agent tool returns, extracts the first SUGGESTION: sentinel per return, and records it via suggestion-record.sh. Warn on malformed sentinel. Integrates with consolidated dispatcher architecture (CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN pattern).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Hook extracts first SUGGESTION: line per Agent tool return and calls suggestion-record.sh
- [ ] Warns on malformed sentinel (no crash)
- [ ] Hook registered in consolidated dispatcher
- [ ] Tests cover sentinel extraction edge cases

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ - 13/13 new tests GREEN, post-dispatchers 20/20, hook-asymmetry 4/4, hooks-json-paths 12/12. Pre-existing test-stop-suggestion-hook failures (2) unchanged from baseline.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ - Acceptance criteria verified: (1) Agent PostToolUse hook extracts first SUGGESTION: line and calls suggestion-record.sh via DSO_SUGGESTION_RECORD_CMD pattern (2) warns 'malformed' to stderr on empty sentinel, exits 0 (3) hook registered in plugin.json Agent matcher → dispatchers/post-agent.sh (4) 8 edge case tests including non-agent skip, missing sentinel, first-only extraction
